channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo: “You Shouldn’t Be Responsible for Some Guy Sexualizing You”
item.description: Olivia Rodrigo dropping truth bombs! 💥 Preach, girl! 🙌 #empowerment #oliviarodrigo

item.title: Tour news: The Chicks, The Tallest Man on Earth, Holy Wave, 6lack, Ink & Dagger, Desire / Johnny Jewel, more
item.description: 🎶 Tour alert! 🚨 The Chicks, The Tallest Man on Earth, 6lack, and more hitting the road soon! Who's ready for live music vibes? 🎉 #TourLife

item.title: Iceland Airwaves announce initial 2026 lineup
item.description: 🚀 Let's pack our bags and chase the Northern Lights! 🌌 Iceland Airwaves just dropped their 2026 lineup! 🇮🇸🎶 #MusicFestivalDreams

item.title: Gilla Band share new single “Giraffe,” plot fall North American tour
item.description: 🦒🎶 Gilla Band has us grooving with their new track "Giraffe"! Who's ready to catch them on tour this fall? 🌟 #NewMusicAlert #GillaBandOnTour

item.title: The Chicks to Tour Taking the Long Way for Its 20th Anniversary
item.description: Get ready to celebrate 20 years of The Chicks with a special tour 🎉 Who's joining the party? 🎶 #TheChicks #TakingTheLongWay

item.title: Bad Bunny Shines Bright In ‘Toy Story 5’
item.description: 🚀 Bad Bunny's star power lights up 'Toy Story 5'! The collaboration we didn't know we needed! 🔥 #BadBunny #ToyStory5

item.title: Listen to Eddy Current Suppression Ring’s Surprise New Album
item.description: 🎉 Surprise! Eddy Current Suppression Ring dropped a new album! 🎶 Let's crank up the volume and dive in together! 🤘 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Hear Weezer’s Rivers Cuomo cover Radiohead, Green Day, Metallica, Dolly Parton, Guns N’ Roses & more
item.description: 🎸 Rock out with Rivers Cuomo as he puts his unique spin on your favorite tunes! Which cover are you most excited to hear? 🎶 #MusicNews #Weezer #RiversCuomo

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo Reveals ‘You Seem Pretty Sad for a Girl So in Love’ Split Track List
item.description: Olivia Rodrigo dropping the tea ☕️ Check out the track list for 'You Seem Pretty Sad for a Girl So in Love'! 🎶 #OliviaRodrigo #NewMusicAlert

item.title: feeble little horse release new LP ‘bitknot,’ announce tour w/ snuggle, Computerwife & more
item.description: Saddle up, music lovers! 🎸 feeble little horse dropped 'bitknot' LP and tour dates with Snuggle and Computerwife coming your way! 🎶🐎 #newmusic #tourdates

item.title: Katseye Break Through a Giant Pink Teddy Bear to Perform ‘Pinky Up’ at 2026 AMAs
item.description: 🎤 Step aside, teddy bear! Katseye is bringing the fun and funk to the 2026 AMAs with 'Pinky Up'! 🐻✨ #Katseye #AMA2026

item.title: “Vegas is Officially Ours”: BTS Return to Sin City as Masters of Intimacy on a Grand Scale
item.description: ✨ BTS lights up Vegas with their electrifying show! 🌟 Who's ready for this epic comeback? #BTS #VegasTakeover 🎶

item.title: Noah Kahan’s Not-That-Unlikely Everyman Stardom
item.description: 🌟 Noah Kahan bringing those everyman vibes to the top! 🎶 Who's vibing with his stardom rise? 💫 #NoahKahan #EverymanStardom

item.title: Paul McCartney Talks About Origins of New Album With Actor Paul Mescal in Amazon Short Film Streaming Now
item.description: 🚀 Dive into the creative process with music legend Paul McCartney and actor Paul Mescal in this must-watch Amazon short film! 🎬🎶 #PaulMcCartney #PaulMescal

item.title: Drake Becomes First Artist To Hold Top Three Albums On Billboard 200
item.description: 🎉 Drake dominating the charts like a boss! 🚀🔥 Who else is feeling the 3peat vibes? 🎶 #DrakeIsOnFire #ChartTopper

item.title: Lola Young Performs Her James Blake Collab For The First Time Then Joins His Set At Radio 1’s Big Weekend
item.description: From debut to duet 🎶 Lola Young crushes her collab with James Blake at Radio 1’s Big Weekend! #MusicMagic

item.title: Robert Fripp Still Unsure Why Hospital Shaved His Balls After Heart Attack
item.description: Rock legend Robert Fripp's mystery: Hospital's surprise ball shave post-heart attack 🤘🔍 #RockNRollMystery #FrippFiasco

item.title: Girls Aloud’s Nicola Roberts Welcomes Her First Baby With Fiancé Mitch Hahn
item.description: 🎉 Congrats to Nicola Roberts on her new bundle of joy! 🍼💕 Sending all the love from the music fam! ✨ #GirlsAloud #NewBaby

item.title: Drake Becomes First Artist to Hold Top Three Billboard 200 Spots
item.description: 🔥 Drake dominating the charts like a boss! 🚀🎶 Who else is feeling the #DrakeVibes? 🌟 #ChartTopper #MusicNews

item.title: George Harrison’s Ex-Wife Pattie Boyd Says No One From Upcoming Beatles Movies Reached Out To Her
item.description: 🎸 Pattie Boyd speaks out on Beatles movies 🎥 Where's the love for the original Fab Four muse? #Beatles #MusicNews

item.title: J Balvin Reminded Sueños Festival 2026 Why OG Status Still Has Muscle
item.description: 🔥 OG vibes in full force as @JBALVIN dominates Sueños Festival 2026! 💪🎵 #LatinMusic #JBalvin #SueñosFestival

item.description: 🎸 Dive into Charli XCX's punk side with her new track 'Playboy Bunny'! Rock on! 🤘 #CharliXCX #NewMusicAlert
